abstract: In this study, Holmqvist offers an original and incisive analysis of the shifting relationship between warfare and policing in the twenty-first century. By exploring contemporary Western strategic thought through an interdisciplinary lens, Holmqvist reveals how the traditional boundaries between military action and domestic law enforcement have become increasingly blurred. The work challenges established paradigms, arguing that modern security strategies reflect a fundamental transformation in how global order is maintained and contested in an era of transnational threats.
